name: Spicy Sichuan Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 ts Asian chili paste or 1 ts Dried hot red pepper flakes, or to taste
1 tbsp Hoisin sauce or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine all ingredients with salt to taste.
2. Blend together until smooth.
3. Transfer the sauce to a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
